parameters.name: AccountKey
parameters.description: The account identifier in key format from which to transfer money.

parameters.name: BeneficiaryInstructionId
parameters.description: Id of the beneficiary instruction to be used for the withdrawal

parameters.name: Currency
parameters.description: The currency the amount is in.

parameters.name: MessageToBeneficiary
parameters.description: For MT103 type messages this is a free text field and for MT202 messages it is used to specify additional information to one of the parties involved in the transaction in a structured format. See the Cash Withdrawal learn page for more information about the format for MT202 messages.Maximum length is 140 ASCII characters.

parameters.name: PayeeVerificationId
parameters.description: The identifier of the verification of payee request.

parameters.name: WithdrawalReasonId
parameters.description: This field is mandatory for PEA-PME transactions. Default value for PEA-PME is Standard and for non PEA-PME transaction it is null.
